task_completion.description: Create commuters.rou.xml with at least three persons departing within the first 300 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of /home/ga/SUMO_Output/commuters.rou.xml containing at least three '<person>' elements with 'depart' attributes set to values less than or equal to 300.

task_completion.description: Define a three-stage trip (walk, ride, walk) for each person in the route file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of commuters.rou.xml showing '<walk>', '<ride>', and '<walk>' child elements inside the '<person>' elements.

task_completion.description: Create run_commuters.sumocfg including the base network, additionals, base routes, and the new commuters route file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of /home/ga/SUMO_Output/run_commuters.sumocfg showing '<net-file>' pointing to pasubio_buslanes.net.xml, '<route-files>' including pasubio.rou.xml, pasubio_busses.rou.xml, and commuters.rou.xml, and an '<additional-files>' tag.

task_completion.description: Configure the simulation to generate trip metrics at tripinfo.xml.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of run_commuters.sumocfg showing an output configuration like '<tripinfo-output value="/home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfo.xml"/>'.

task_completion.description: Run the SUMO simulation using the created configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing the execution of a command like 'sumo -c /home/ga/SUMO_Output/run_commuters.sumocfg' and the resulting SUMO log indicating successful completion (e.g., 'Simulation ended at time: ...').

task_completion.description: Verify that tripinfo.xml was generated and contains trip metrics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output (like 'cat' or 'ls -l') or a text editor showing the existence and contents of /home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfo.xml, containing '<tripinfo>' elements.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually ran the SUMO simulation rather than faking the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the actual 'sumo' command execution in the terminal with standard SUMO startup headers and step logs, not just an echoed string.

integrity.description: Ensure tripinfo.xml was generated by SUMO and not manually created.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tripinfo.xml file should have standard SUMO XML headers/comments (e.g., 'generated on ... by Eclipse SUMO') and complex metric values that would be difficult to manually calculate.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the specified directories for inputs and outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in the terminal commands and configuration files should explicitly reference '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/' and '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/'.
